task: place the pink block on the table
raw:
SCENE ANALYSIS - A white plastic tray is on a wooden table. A small yellow object is on the table. A pink block is on the tray. The pink block is a cube with a matte finish. STRATEGY - The pink block is already on the tray, so the task is to move it from the tray to the table. First, reach for the pink block on the tray, grasp it, then transport it to the table and place it there. Failure modes include dropping the block during transport or misplacing it. AFFORDANCE REASONING - Step 1 reach the pink block on the tray; Step 2 grasp the pink block; Step 3 transport to the table; Step 4 place on the table.
Goal: on(pink_block, table)
Scene: white_tray, yellow_object, table, pink_block
Step 1: reach(pink_block)
  affordance_region: the top surface of the pink block on the white tray
  contact: gripper_state(open) [progress]
  spatial: distance(gripper, pink_block, <, 0.03) [completion]
  direction: approach_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: distance(gripper, pink_block) < 0.03
Step 2: grasp(pink_block)
  affordance_region: the top surface of the pink block
  contact: holding(pink_block) [completion]
  direction: grasp_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: holding(pink_block)
Step 3: transport(pink_block -> table)
  affordance_region: an empty area on the table
  spatial: above(pink_block, table, 0.05) [completion]
  safety: no_drop(pink_block)
  done_when: above(pink_block, table, 0.05)
Step 4: place(pink_block -> table)
  affordance_region: an empty area on the table
  contact: surface_contact(pink_block, table) [completion]; released(pink_block) [completion]
  pose: stable(pink_block) [completion]
  done_when: surface_contact(pink_block, table) AND released(pink_block)
<END_OF_PLAN>

steps.affordance_region: the top surface of the pink block on the white tray
the top surface of the pink block
an empty area on the table
an empty area on the table
